title: ALTER TABLE corrupts the schema for tables that start with "sqlite"
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE sqlite_test (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE sqlite1234 (id INTEGER, value DOUBLE PRECISION, description TEXT);
ALTER TABLE sqlite1234 RENAME TO User;
SELECT name, sql FROM sys.tables WHERE name LIKE 'sqlite%';
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE renames table inconsistently in sqlite_master
